message:
feat: HTTP compression, listener, server lifecycle, config, macro fixes

- Add HTTP compression negotiation (compress.rs): ContentEncoding,
  negotiate_encoding, Compressor/Decompressor traits (25 tests)
- Add HTTP/1.1 server listener with graceful shutdown (listener.rs):
  accept loop with poll_fn-based select, ConnectionManager integration (8 tests)
- Enhance HTTP/1.1 server connection lifecycle: keep-alive, request
  limits, idle timeouts, ConnectionState/ConnectionPhase (14 tests)
- Add unified ServerConfig/ServerProfile to config.rs (6 tests)
- Fix macro crate: refactor conformance arg parsing to avoid
  proc_macro::TokenStream outside proc-macro context (34 tests pass)
- Fix clippy single_match lint in scope.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
